transcripts.text: Product Manager: We need to address the checkout flow urgently. Users are really frustrated with how long it takes. We're losing customers daily because of this. Developer: How many steps currently? Product Manager: Five clicks from cart to confirmation. Customers are abandoning purchases. This is critical for revenue - we're talking thousands in lost sales per day.

Designer: It would be nice to have dark mode eventually. Several users mentioned it in feedback. Developer: How urgent is this? Product Manager: Not very. It's a nice to have when we have bandwidth. Maybe in Q2 or Q3.

Developer: The login button color doesn't match the design system. Product Manager: Yeah, that's just cosmetic though. Known issue but very minor. We can look at it when we have time. Let's focus on the critical bugs first.

Support Lead: We're getting flooded with complaints about the search function. Customers can't find products even when typing exact names. This is blocking purchases. Product Manager: How many tickets? Support Lead: 50+ in the last week alone. People are giving up and going to competitors.

Product Manager: We should add export to PDF for reports. A few enterprise clients asked about it. Developer: Is this blocking anything? Product Manager: No, they have workarounds. It would improve their workflow but it's not stopping them from using the product.
